channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: New Climate Projections Suggest Extreme Warming May Be Avoided, but Paris Targets Are Likely Out of Reach
item.description: New climate research suggests that the most catastrophic warming scenarios once widely discussed by scientists are becoming less likely, mainly because renewable energy adoption has accelerated and de...

item.title: Orlando Pirates secure Betway Premiership title after Orbit College own goals in final match
item.description: Orlando Pirates ended a 14-year wait for a domestic league title in dramatic fashion after defeating Orbit College 2-0 at a packed Mbombela Stadium to clinch the Betway Premiership crown. The match wa...

item.title: Phil Collins rules out Rock Hall performance but leaves door open to future touring
item.description: Phil Collins has confirmed that he will not perform at his upcoming Rock and Roll Hall of Fame induction ceremony, citing the need to be in suitable physical condition for live performance. Speaking i...

item.title: Donny Pangilinan appears on 'Everybody Sing' with Vice Ganda and Songbayanan Virtual Assistants
item.description: Actor and television personality Donny Pangilinan joined the popular ABS-CBN musical game show 'Everybody Sing', bringing additional energy and excitement to the program. The episode featured a specia...

item.title: Matt Corby reflects on grief, life and a magpie-inspired moment on new album Tragic Magic
item.description: Australian singer-songwriter Matt Corby has spoken about the deeply personal experiences that shaped his latest album, Tragic Magic, as he prepares to tour Perth. The record, which features 13 tracks,...

item.title: Supreme Court takes suo motu cognisance of Twisha Sharma death case amid allegations of investigation lapses
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has decided to hear a suo motu case related to the unnatural death of 32-year-old actor-model Twisha Sharma, who was found dead at her matrimonial home in Bhopal on May 12, ...

item.title: Shell Nigeria Gas, MAN and Rivers State Partner to Expand Industrial Gas Infrastructure
item.description: Shell Nigeria Gas Limited (SNG) and the Manufacturers Association of Nigeria (MAN) don show strong support for efforts to expand gas supply infrastructure across Rivers State in order to improve energ...

item.title: DCI establishes specialised investigative team to address rising femicide cases in Kenya
item.description: The National Police Service (NPS) in Kenya has raised serious concern over the increasing cases of Sexual and Gender-Based Violence (SGBV), particularly femicide, which continues to affect women and g...

item.title: Mpumi Khoza praises youth development after Orlando Pirates secure historic domestic treble
item.description: Orlando Pirates have capped off a remarkable season by winning the Betway Premiership title and completing a historic domestic treble. The Soweto giants defeated Orbit College 2–0 in their final leagu...

item.title: Expert warns Trump risks escalation in potential military action against Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump is reportedly considering a significant escalation in U.S. military actions against Iran, including the possibility of launching a new wave of strikes that could effectively end...

item.title: Misinformation and declining vaccination rates linked to Australia’s largest diphtheria outbreak in decades
item.description: Australia is currently facing its most significant diphtheria outbreak in decades, with more than 230 cases reported in 2026 across multiple states and territories, including the Northern Territory, Q...

item.title: Fernand Toussaint and the Elegance of Belle Époque Portraiture
item.description: Fernand Toussaint (1873–1956) was a Belgian painter widely recognized for his refined portraits of women during the Belle Époque and the interwar period. Trained within the academic traditions of his ...

item.title: Trump signals Sunday decision on Iran policy amid escalating tensions and reported military options
item.description: According to the article, President Donald Trump indicated that a major decision regarding U.S. policy toward Iran is expected to be made by Sunday, as discussions within his administration continue o...

item.title: Ontario SIU investigates serious injuries after police pursuit incident in Ottawa’s ByWard Market
item.description: Ontario’s Special Investigations Unit (SIU) has launched an investigation after a man suffered life-threatening injuries while attempting to flee from police in Ottawa’s ByWard Market. The incident oc...

item.title: Students in Nairobi and Mombasa Use Storytelling and Art to Foster Peace and Social Cohesion
item.description: Hundreds of secondary school students from Nairobi and Mombasa have successfully completed a nine-month creative programme focused on promoting peace, tolerance, and social cohesion through storytelli...

item.title: India’s Prachand and US-made Apache fulfil different combat roles in military modernisation
item.description: The article compares India’s indigenously developed Light Combat Helicopter (LCH) Prachand with the American Boeing AH-64E Apache attack helicopter, while explaining why both platforms remain importan...

item.title: Morocco targets 2027 completion of 115,000-seat Casablanca stadium for 2030 World Cup final bid
item.description: Morocco is pushing ahead with plans to complete a massive new stadium near Casablanca that is being positioned as a potential venue for the 2030 FIFA World Cup final. According to a project official, ...

item.title: Malaking sunog sa Binondo itinaas sa Task Force Charlie
item.description: Isang malaking sunog ang sumiklab sa Binondo, Maynila noong Mayo 23, 2026 at umabot ito sa antas na Task Force Charlie ayon sa mga awtoridad. Ang pagtaas sa Task Force Charlie ay indikasyon na malaki ...

item.title: Several Former Tinubu Ministers Fail to Secure APC Tickets Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Several former ministers under President Bola Tinubu administration don suffer political setbacks after dem resign from the Federal Executive Council to contest for elective positions under the APC ah...

item.title: Centre directs Delhi Gymkhana Club to vacate 27.3-acre Safdarjung Road premises by June 5
item.description: The Union government has ordered the Delhi Gymkhana Club to hand over its 27.3-acre premises located at 2, Safdarjung Road in New Delhi to the Land and Development Office (L&DO) by June 5. The directi...
